modlock.command.message.add.success: You are now allowed to use: %1$s.
modlock.command.message.add.fail: You are already allowed to use: %1$s.
modlock.command.message.remove.success: You are no longer allowed to use: %1$s.
modlock.command.message.remove.success.t: %1$s is no longer allowed to use: %2$s.
modlock.command.message.remove.fail: You are already not allowed to use: %1$s.
modlock.command.message.remove.fail.targ: %1$s is already not allowed to use: %2$s.
modlock.command.message.has.fail: You are not allowed to use: %1$s.
modlock.event.player_tick.drop_not_allow: You are not allowed to use: %1$s. Please unlock %2$s first.
